name: video-summarizer
description: Download and transcribe Instagram Reels & YouTube videos, extracting key lessons and actionable steps. Supports Gemini Flash (cloud) or Whisper (local) transcription.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Optional Gemini API key for cloud-based transcription. Leave empty to use local Whisper instead. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
